properties.description: Turns the device on, when set >= 1. Turns it off, when set to <1.
Sets the desired speed of the elevator. (0.5 - 20)
When written to, makes the carriage go to that level.
Returns whether the device is turned on and receives power. (0 for no, 1 for yes)
Returns the current amount of power, required by the device, in watts.
Opens the device , when set >= 1. Closes it, when set to < 1.
Locks the device , when set >= 1. Unlocks it, when set to <1.
When written to, makes the carriage go to that level.
Returns whether the device is flashing an error. (0 for no, 1 for yes)
